description_long: This juice bar is a compact, kiosk-style structure with a flat, overhanging roof and a prominent serving counter at the front. The front facade features a glass display case filled with neatly arranged doughnuts, and above it is a large, illuminated Krispy Kreme Doughnuts sign in green and red. The lower section of the front is clad in a warm, wood-textured panel, contrasting with the otherwise white and gray exterior. The sides and back are plain, with the back featuring a louvered panel, likely for ventilation or access. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on product display and brand visibility. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal and glass, with some wood or wood-like accents.
description: A compact, kiosk-style juice bar with a glass display case of doughnuts, a Krispy Kreme sign, and a clean, modern exterior with wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serving counter, glass display case with doughnuts, Krispy Kreme sign, and wood-textured panel.
description_view_1: Side view showing a plain, solid white wall with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless white surface, emphasizing the kiosk's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Side view with a louvered panel, likely for ventilation or access, and a partial view of the interior workspace.
attribute_signage: Large Krispy Kreme Doughnuts sign above the display case, featuring green and red colors with bold, illuminated text and logo, centrally placed and highly visible.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, with clean lines, flat surfaces, and a functional kiosk design accented by wood-textured panels.
